title: Kilner 50 x 50 cm Muslin Square, White (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
MUSLIN SQUARE | The Kilner Muslin Cloth fulfils a multitude of food preparation tasks.

DURABLE | Made from 100% cotton fabric with an ultra-fine mesh which is soft, durable and machine washable. Sustainable to be used time and time again. Measuring 50cm x 50cm with a sewn hemmed edge to prevent fraying.
PRESERVING ACCESSORIES | Ensure your preserves are perfect every time with our range of essential preserving accessories.

KILNER | The original Kilner Jar with it's distinctive pressure seal and iconic design is as much-loved and successful now as it was over 179 years ago. Put simply, households all over the world trust it to successfully preserve and pickle their fruit and vegetables.
description: The 50 x 50cm Muslin Square is 100% cotton with hemmed edges. The muslin square is machine washable.
